home.title: Operating Systems Museum
home.subtitle: Explore the evolution of operating systems from the earliest personal computers to modern platforms through an immersive digital museum experience.
home.featured_subtitle: Landmark operating systems that shaped computing history

library.title: Operating Systems
library.subtitle: A comprehensive catalog of landmark operating systems

detail.emulator_description: This operating system is proprietary. To launch it, provide your own legally obtained disk image when emulator support is enabled in a future update.
detail.emulator_opensource: This open-source OS is compatible with browser-based emulation. Full emulator support is coming soon.
detail.not_found_desc: The operating system you requested could not be found in the museum database.

compare.title: Compare Systems
compare.description: Select two operating systems to compare them side by side.
compare.subtitle: Select up to three operating systems to compare side by side
compare.select_both: Select two operating systems above to start comparing.
compare.no_selection: Select operating systems above to begin comparing

gallery.title: Screenshot Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Visual History
gallery.description: A visual journey through landmark operating systems — their interfaces, boot screens, and design language across the decades.

museum.title: Museum Mode
museum.subtitle: Interactive Emulation
museum.description: Experience open-source operating systems in your browser. Select a system below to explore it in an interactive environment.
museum.emulator_info: Browser-based emulation coming soon. For now, explore the detailed information page.

favorites.title: Your Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Operating systems you have bookmarked
favorites.empty_desc: Click the heart icon on any operating system to save it here.

about.title: About the Museum
about.subtitle: A digital monument to computing history
about.mission: The Operating Systems Museum exists to preserve, celebrate, and educate about the software that made the digital age possible. Every OS represented here shaped the computers, devices, and culture we know today.
about.cta_desc: Dive into the complete collection of landmark operating systems and trace the evolution of computing.
